# Node modules and build artifacts
node_modules
.nuxt
.output
dist
build

# Coverage and test files
coverage


# Pre-commit and detector config (patterns could self-match)
.pre-commit-config.yaml
.trufflehog-detectors.yaml

# Environment files (already in .gitignore)
.env
!.env.example

# Log files
output.txt

# Temporary files
temp
tmp

# IDE and editor files
.vscode
.idea

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Git files
.git

# Known safe files with false positives
vitest.setup.ts
production-dineros-secrets.yaml
google-service-account-secret.yaml

nextstepguru-project.json

.test.ts

# Node modules and dependencies
.pnpm

# K8s manifests (reference secret names via secretKeyRef, no inline values)
\.deploy/
# Docs with example env vars (remove to scan README)
README\.md

# Backup files with test keys that are not in git
prisma/backup
microservice/prisma/backup
